title: atractylis kentrophylloides
intro: Atractylis kentrophylloides, also known as centaury or bitter grass, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter and astringent properties, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Atractylis kentrophylloides include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Atractylis kentrophylloides is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can also be used to make tinctures and extracts for medicinal purposes.
